title: Labor and Employment Law - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Labor and Employment Law 7 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Laborers Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES INC CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides civil legal aid and advocacy, can not assist with criminal law cases. Organized into specialty units: Housing/Consumer Unit, Income Maintenance Unit, Employment/Individual Rights Unit (Immigration Law Project, Protecting Our Veterans, and Public Guardian Program), and Family Unit. 225 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Low-income households (125% of the Federal Poverty Level), age 60 and older, and veterans. Specialty units may have additional eligibility requirements. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm (541) 779-7292 Get Directions More Details EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY COMMISSION SEATTLE FIELD OFFICE EMPLOYMENT DISCRIMINATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Enforces federal laws prohibiting discrimination in employment based on race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, gender identity, and sexual orientation), national origin, age, disability, or genetic information. This includes discrimination involved in hiring, firing, promotions, harassment, training, wages, and benefits. Also works with Fair Employment Practice Agencies (FEPAs) and Tribal Employment Rights Offices (TEROs) to manage charges of discrimination and the protection of the employment rights of Native Americans. 909 First Avenue Suite 400 Seattle, WA 981041061 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-3pm Email (800) 669-4000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON FOREST GROVE FARMWORKER OFFICE FARMWORKER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help to migrant and seasonal farmworkers with employment, housing, unemployment, and tax issues. Most employment and housing issues are related to payment of wages, unauthorized pay deductions, poor living conditions in labor camps, retaliation for asserting legal rights, poor health and safety conditions on the job, pesticide problems, and discrimination. Also gives referrals to other kinds of legal programs. Eligibility: Agricultural (including seasonal) workers who have experienced civil legal problems in the State of Oregon Hours: By appointment only (503) 214-1384 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON SALEM FARMWORKER OFFICE FARMWORKER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help to migrant and seasonal farmworkers with employment, housing, unemployment, and tax issues. Most employment and housing issues are related to payment of wages, unauthorized pay deductions, poor living conditions in labor camps, retaliation for asserting legal rights, poor health and safety conditions on the job, pesticide problems, and discrimination. Also gives referrals to other kinds of legal programs. Eligibility: Agricultural (including seasonal) workers who have experienced civil legal problems in the State of Oregon Hours: By appointment only (503) 981-5291 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON LAW CENTER OREGON LAW CENTER PORTLAND REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON LAW HELP WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website offers legal information regarding various issues, including housing, family law, employment law, elder law, government benefits, and consumer protection. Provides links to legal service providers, resources, and a directory of legal aid providers. 621 SW Morrison Street Suite 1450 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BUREAU OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIES WAGE AND HOUR DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Enforces laws covering state minimum wage and overtime requirements, working conditions, child labor, farm and forest labor contracting, and wage collection. Enforces the payment of wage rates required to be paid to construction workers on public works projects and determines the wage rates based on an annual construction industry survey. 1800 SW 1st Avenue Suite 500 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Job complaint must have occurred in Oregon Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 245-3844 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BUREAU OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIES TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE FOR EMPLOYERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support, guidance, and training to help Oregon employers understand and follow employment and civil rights laws. 1800 SW 1st Avenue Suite 500 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Employers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 361-8400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE WORKERS COMPENSATION DIVISION WORKERS' COMPENSATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Enforces and regulates Oregon's workers' compensation laws and administers funds to benefit employers and workers. Provides information and directs callers to appropriate offices for further information on workers' rights, compensation benefits, reemployment assistance, fraud reporting, dispute resolution, and ombudsman services. 350 Winter Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 947-7585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES INC CENTER FOR NONPROFIT LEGAL SERVICES OREGON LAW CENTER OREGON LAW HELP WEBSITE OREGON STATE BUREAU OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIES WAGE AND HOUR DIVISION OREGON STATE WORKERS COMPENSATION DIVISION WORKERS' COMPENSATION
